system.description: Most Incarnadines pay lip service to their god whilst paying off their debt; you've bought in wholesale, and you understand the terrible power of your patron. Gain the Religion domain. Once per session, when you visit a shrine of Incarne and preach to the faithful, refresh equal to the size of the shrine (D4 for cupboard-sized devotionals, D12 for a glorious temple). The Red Market is too fractious and shifting to act as a shrine for the purposes of this ability.
